title: Isla's Sleepy Treasure Hunt
synopsis: Join Isla on a gentle treasure hunt adventure that leads her through her cozy bedroom to find the most precious treasure of all - a good night's sleep.

pages.text: Isla found a crinkly old map under her pillow. It had dotted lines and a big red X! 'A treasure map!' she whispered excitedly. The map showed her very own bedroom, but it looked like a magical island. Her bed was drawn like a cozy cave, and her toy chest looked like a pirate ship. Isla traced the dotted path with her finger. Where could this treasure be hiding?

illustration.description: A young girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes sits on her bed holding an aged parchment treasure map. The map shows her bedroom drawn in treasure map style with compass roses and dotted trails in sepia tones. Moonlight streams through the window.
illustration.alt: Isla examining a treasure map in her bedroom

pages.text: Isla tiptoed along the dotted trail. First, she crawled under her desk like it was a bridge over rushing water. Then she climbed over her stuffed animals like they were big boulders. The map led her to her bookshelf, which looked like a tall mountain on the parchment. She found a shiny button there - her first clue! Next, the trail pointed to her closet, drawn like a dark cave. Inside, she discovered her favorite fuzzy socks. 'I'm getting closer!' she giggled softly.

illustration.description: A treasure map style illustration showing a young girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes following a dotted trail through her bedroom. The room is drawn like an adventure map with sepia tones, showing furniture as mountains and caves with jewel accents marking her discoveries.
illustration.alt: Isla following the treasure trail through her bedroom

pages.text: The final X on the map pointed right back to her bed! Isla looked everywhere - under her blanket, behind her pillow, even under the bed. Then she noticed something wonderful. Her mom had left her favorite stuffed bunny and a warm glass of milk on her nightstand. But the real treasure wasn't just the bunny or the milk. It was how sleepy and happy she felt after her adventure! Isla snuggled into bed with her bunny. 'The best treasure is a cozy bed and sweet dreams,' she yawned. Soon she was fast asleep, dreaming of more gentle adventures.

illustration.description: A treasure map style illustration of a young girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes tucked in bed with a stuffed bunny. The scene is drawn on aged parchment with sepia tones, showing her cozy bed marked with a large X and jewel accents, with compass roses in the corners and a peaceful, sleepy atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Isla sleeping peacefully in her bed with her treasure - a stuffed bunny

metadata.illustrationStyle: treasure map style, aged parchment, compass roses, dotted trails, sepia tones, jewel accents, bold explorers, adventure cartography, hand-drawn maps

questions.question: Where did Isla find the treasure map?
questions.explanation: Isla found the crinkly old treasure map under her pillow when she was getting ready for bed.

questions.question: What was the first clue Isla found?
questions.explanation: At her bookshelf, which looked like a tall mountain on the map, Isla found a shiny button as her first clue.

questions.question: Where was the final X on the treasure map?
questions.explanation: The final X on the treasure map pointed right back to Isla's bed, where the real treasure was waiting.

questions.question: What did Isla decide was the best treasure?
choices: a cozy bed and sweet dreams
questions.explanation: Isla realized that the best treasure was having a cozy bed and sweet dreams after her gentle adventure.
